creator: manu@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to jakub_lach from comment #30)
That's the other way around, linuxkpi_gplv2 depends on linuxkpi.
firmware is expected as Niclas said.
USB is a bit suprising, I'll have a look if the dep is needed or not (but tbh having a desktop without usb would be ... surprising).
